features: Dove Soothing Caring Almond Cream and Hibiscus Bath Soak has a soft floral scent to delight your senses
Made with ¼ moisturising cream, this nourishing bubble bath helps care for your skin
A moisturising bath soak that gently cleans your skin, leaving it beautifully scented and silky smooth
An indulging bath product with nourishing almond cream and the relaxing scent of hibiscus
Enjoy the renewed feeling of soft, smooth skin with Dove Soothing Caring Almond Cream and Hibiscus Bath Soak
The bottle for our bath soak is made with 100% recycled plastic*
description: Product Description Turn your relaxing bubble bath into a self-care pamper session with Dove Soothing Caring Almond Cream and Hibiscus Bath Soak. Specially designed to gently care for your skin and indulge your senses, this bath product blends all the nourishing care you love from Dove with almond cream and the relaxing scent of hibiscus for a soothing sensory experience that will leave you feeling truly relaxed. The formula of our bath soaks contains ¼ moisturising cream to help care for your skin as you bathe while enhancing your skin’s moisture levels. You will get more from your bubble bath than just a general body cleanse; this nourishing bath soak creates a rich cloud of creamy almond and hibiscus-scented bubbles for a pampering bath that will help you truly unwind. To get beautifully nourished skin, simply pour this renewing bath soak under warm, running water. Lie back and enjoy a moment of pampering as the comforting scent fills your bathroom. Why not also try our bath salts to soothe tired and aching muscles while leaving your skin soft, smooth and delicately fragranced? More of a shower person? Our range of shower gels will pamper and soften your skin in just one shower. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people – and by 2030, they’ll have helped ¼ billion young people through their educational programmes and resources. *bottle excluding cap Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Acrylates Copolymer, Citric Acid, Glucose, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Hibiscus Sabdariffa Flower Extract, Isopropyl Palmitate, Pentylene Glycol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Seed Extract, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, CI 17200, CI 19140 Directions Shake the can well to mix the protective and moisturising ingredients evenly, and add the product to your bath water. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. If swallowed, seek medical help. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
